mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_config( configno, config_key, config_name, config_type, config_val, description, use_yn, rdate )
VALUES( ai_config_seq.nextval, #{config_key}, #{config_name}, #{config_type}, #{config_val}, #{description}, #{use_yn}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT configno, config_key, config_name, config_type, config_val, description, use_yn, rdate
FROM ai_config
ORDER BY configno DESC

SELECT configno, config_key, config_name, config_type, config_val, description, use_yn, rdate
FROM ai_config
WHERE config_type = #{config_type}
ORDER BY configno DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE ai_config
SET
config_key = #{config_key},
config_name = #{config_name},
config_type = #{config_type},
config_val = #{config_val},
description = #{description},
use_yn = #{use_yn}
WHERE configno = #{configno}
